✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

Waveform visualization: GPU (Metal) waveform rendering. Implemented as an os(macOS)/!os(macOS) split pair of same-named types — each platform claim anchors its own side.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of AudioKit Waveform? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
